claim_summary: TBI Africa reported a service-delivery pledge and staff commitment message by KEDCO MD.
Interview stated KEDCO maintained public service delivery during COVID-19 and customers saw improved supply.
Daily Trust interview described KEDCO service continuity and safety priorities during COVID-19.
ICT sector growth during the recession period was cited in official achievements materials.
NCC-linked statement reported ICT contribution to GDP at 14.42 percent in Q2 2021.
NCC-linked statement reported broadband penetration at 40.01 percent by September 2021.
Public report stated 80 million Nigerians had broadband access by December 2021.
USPF ministry-achievements page reported 1667 projects/centres established and 455 ongoing.
NITDA article credited agency development and GDP relevance in the digital economy ecosystem.
No direct electricity/water utility management role identified in the included public sources.
USPF ministry-achievements page reported more than 61 million unique NIN enrolments.
USPF ministry-achievements page reported more than 219000 direct digital skills beneficiaries.
KEDCO role supports regional commerce through distribution service, but seed data lacks audited economic impact figures.
Blueprint reported inspection of new transformers/accessories and feeder construction to improve service delivery.
Reported transformer/accessory procurement and feeder construction indicate operational improvement activity.
NERC Q2 2022 report listed Kano DisCo metering performance at 22.52 percent.
NERC Q4 2022 reported metering, billing, and interruption were major complaint categories across DisCos.
Daily Trust reported Gwamna statement that staff training and retraining were part of KEDCO transformation strategy.
